name: @pmxt/cli
description: Command-line interface for PMXT prediction market APIs
author: PMXT Contributors

auth.description: Manage PMXT API keys and venue credentials.

enterprise.description: Run Enterprise matched-market and SQL commands.

feed.description: Fetch data-feed tickers, candles, order books, and streams.

order.description: Build, create, submit, cancel, or get orders.

orders.description: Fetch open, closed, all, or user trade history.

router.description: Find matching markets and events across venues.

server.description: Manage an installed local pmxt-core sidecar.

watch.description: Stream venue order books and trades as JSONL.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate.js && node scripts/verify-argv-alias-normalizer.js && node scripts/verify-root-help.js && node scripts/verify-runtime-errors.js
